title: Fence Post ‘Basically Verifies’ Secret Side Mission About Someone’s Cousin, Say Scholars With
description: A deeply serious analysis of one slightly odd fence post which has, predictably, been treated as a full-grown prophecy.

title: Man In Vice Cafe Orders ‘The Usual’, Receives 14-Minute Lecture On Sandwich Theory
description: A local lunch has spiralled into a full civic event after one customer accidentally asked for ‘the usual’ and opened a philosophical storm.

title: Car Park Receipt ‘Strongly Implies’ New Vice City Radio Station For Traffic Updates, Sandwich Chat
description: A crumpled receipt from a luminous car park has been treated by fans as proof of a station that only plays road safety jingles and callers arguing about chips.

title: Experts Say Every Palm Tree In Vice City Now ‘Looks Suspicious’, Which Is Not Strictly A Crime But
description: A serious-looking breakdown of why fans keep interpreting decorative foliage as hidden content, seasonal content and emotional content.

title: Parked Scooter 'Basically Confirms' A New Radio Station Dedicated To Weather Warnings And Mild Drama
description: A commuter scooter, allegedly seen outside a Vice City café, has apparently started a whole new chapter in human overconfidence.

title: Fans Conclude Every Bush In Vice City Is Plotting Something After Prolonged Leaf Activity
description: Our team of analysts has examined the foliage and found it to be, at minimum, suspiciously leafy.

title: Soggy Receipt 'Strongly Hints' At Five New Boat Horns And A Very Judgy Pelican
description: A damp receipt from a burger kiosk has allegedly kicked off fresh speculation about hidden features, nautical drama, and at least one bird with standards.

title: Map Corner 'Essentially Verifies' Three Secret Sunsets, Two Tramlines And A Bin Schedule With Attitu
description: A new round of map-based deduction has led fans to conclude the game world will contain more weather, more transport, and at least one bin collection with narrative depth

title: Vice Diner Introduces 'Mystery Toast' After Customers Begin Ordering 'Whatever The Rumour Is'

title: Trailer Parallax 'Strongly Suggests' Seventeen New Weather Types And One Moody Seagull

title: Map Shape 'Practically Confirms' At Least Nine Lost Bin Lorries, Experts Claim
description: A solemn breakdown of the latest imaginary map chatter suggests the city will once again be full of places for people to get mildly confused in.

title: Vice Deli Sells Out Of 'Mysterious Sandwich' After Rumour About Floating Iguana
description: Locals reportedly formed a civilised queue outside a fictional corner shop after word spread that an unusually calm lizard had been spotted near the salad bar.

title: A brand new leak
description: you wont have read this anywhere else

title: Trailer palm tree may confirm 47 separate endings, say men with rulers.
description: A shadow, a leaf, and what might be a seagull have convinced our panel that every mission will branch into either crime, karaoke, or responsible parking.

title: Retail listing briefly promises realistic traffic cone emotions.
description: The page vanished within minutes, which proves either a cover-up or that someone needed to fix the spelling of vehicular melancholy.

title: Vice beaches prepare for influx of people photographing puddles.
description: Residents have been advised not to stand near reflective surfaces, neon signs, or suspiciously high-resolution scooters with surprisingly detailed suspension.

title: Scientists discover fans can hear release dates in ambient synth pads.
description: The breakthrough came after one listener slowed the trailer by 0.5 percent and heard what experts describe as probably a drum.

title: Insider says every NPC has a mortgage and a favourite crisp flavour.
description: We cannot verify this, but our source was wearing sunglasses indoors, which is the highest known credential in games journalism.
